entity.label: Ezri
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Help of Jehovah, the son of Chelub. He superintended, under David, those who “did the work of the field for tillage” (1 Chr. 27:26).

nodes.label: Ezri
nodes.description: Help of Jehovah, the son of Chelub. He superintended, under David, those who “did the work of the field for tillage” (1 Chr. 27:26).

verses.text: And over them that did the work of the field for tillage of the ground was Ezri the son of Chelub:
